creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry, I saw this initially, couldn't reproduce, and then it got lost in my e-mail. =(

I think I'll need more information about your build environment to reproduce, though. Up until a recent (yesterday) update to gcc-arm-embedded broke arduino-tools, this build was fine both in my environment and the package builders.

I'll look into this again after I fix arduino-tools.
